'''Barid Mesoriaam''' was a high-ranked [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] agent of the [[Corellian Resistance/Legends|Corellian Resistance]]. He was one of the few who had [[Bria Tharen]]'s personal [[holocomm]] code.

==Biography==
In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Mesoriaam was captured by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and imprisoned in his [[Desilijic Complex/Legends|Mos Eisley town house]]. Jabba's men tortured Mesoriaam for information on the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Mesoriaam was found by [[Muftak/Legends|Muftak]] and [[Kabe/Legends|Kabe]], who had broken into Jabba's mansion. He promised them 30,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for rescuing a [[datadot]] (that he used to hide behind his teeth) and giving it an unidentified [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]].
